traitLibrary.name: Neon Nocturne — Complete Archetype System

rendering.architecture: Complete portrait plus curated illustrated motif
rendering.compositing: Motif is erased inside a solid silhouette-protection matte

rules: Complete portraits are never split into head or torso layers
Only curated hand-drawn night motifs are used
Motifs cannot erase, mask, or overpaint portrait pixels
Motif library is limited to nature, nocturnal objects, and creatures
No text, logo, signature, or watermark
